title: Add comment support in Workflows and Automations
excerpt:
It would be very helpful to add the ability to insert comments or notes inside **Workflow Blocks (custom workflows) and also in standard automations. 
Ideally, comments could be added per block, like internal dev notes, …

posts.author: ripaus (Pablo)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very helpful to add the ability to insert comments or notes inside **Workflow Blocks (custom workflows) and also in standard automations.

Ideally, comments could be added per block, like internal dev notes, to clarify logic, track changes, or communicate between team members. This is especially important in complex workflows where documentation is key.

posts.author: bmurphy (Bella Murphy)
posts.cookedHtml: I find using the comment bars on automations is great for organising thoughts and clarifying what each automation is for. In workflows, I like to rename the block itself to provide more detail on what they do. I agree a larger comment box might be nice but in the meantime, the block titles work quite well!
